title: Bremeria scabridior
taxonomy: Bremeria scabridior is a species of plant within the family Apocynaceae. This family includes over 5,000 species of plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The Apocynaceae family is further divided into 346 genera. Bremeria scabridior is one of the species found in the genus Bremeria, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The classification of Bremeria scabridior highlights the intricate relationships between plants within the Apocynaceae family.
